arts.ttl: Guardiola renews with Manchester City and will complete 10 seasons at the club
arts.sum: "His hunger for improvement and success remains insatiable and the direct beneficiaries of this will continue to be our players and coaching staff, the culture of our club and English football in general," said Khaldoon Al Mubarak, Manchester City chairman. I t is now official: Pep Guardiola (Sampedor, 1971), as we reported in MARCA on Tuesday, November 19, has renewed his contract with Manchester City until June 2026, with the option of a further campaign (26-27), thus completing a cycle, when it ends, of at least 10 seasons at the helm of an entity for which he signed in the summer of 2016.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes honest Man City contract admission as true feelings explained
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola will remain in charge of Manchester City for the next two years after penning a new contract extension

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals what recent change convinced him to sign new Man City deal and stay at the club for another two years as the Catalan admits he seriously considered leaving
arts.sum: Guardiola confirmed Mail Sport's story from May that he was expected to leave next summer, but suggested that a decisive display of commitment was required to send a message.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola praised for giving Man City ideal boost after being judged "unfairly"
arts.sum: Manchester City lost four consecutive matches before Pep Guardiola ended doubts about his future by agreeing a new deal and Joleon Lescott details what it means for the club's trophy hopes

arts.ttl: I felt I could not leave now
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says the reason for signing for a contract extension was that he simply couldn’t leave Manchester City now. Guardiola has led City to incredible success during his eight-and-a-half years at the Club with 18 major trophies, including six Premier League titles and one UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: Every Trophy Won (so far!)
arts.sum: That was followed by UEFA Super Cup and FIFA Club World Cup successes and last season, the Blues became the first English men’s team to win four successive topflight titles. The first Premier League title came a few months later – and who could have dreamed the Blues would be crowned champions six out of seven seasons from 2017 to 2024?

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sends ominous message to Man City's rivals after signing new contract
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has penned a new contract which will keep him at Manchester City until June 2027, taking him beyond a decade at the helm of the Premier League champions

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Pep Guardiola signs Man City contract extension
arts.sum: OFFICIAL: Pep Guardiola signs Man City contract extension Manchester City have officially announced Pep Guardiola's contract extension.

arts.ttl: Man City chairman's first words on new Pep Guardiola contract as defiant message sent
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has signed a contract extension at Manchester City, with his previous deal set to expire in the summer

arts.ttl: Two more years! Man City confirm Pep Guardiola contract extension
arts.sum: Manchester City officially announce that manager Pep Guardiola has signed a two-year contract extension.
